scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --prefix-colors "bgBlue,bgGreen" --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND" "npm run dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.kill: powershell -Command "Get-Process node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Stop-Process -Force; Write-Host 'Procesos Node terminados'"
